CustomField.description:
The agency or organization that provided homebuyer education to the applicant(s).
Tip: Create an account for the Homebuyer Education agency before looking up.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The agency or organization that provided homebuyer education to the applicant(s).
Tip: Create an account for the Homebuyer Education agency before looking up.
CustomField.label: Homebuyer Ed Agency
